metadata.key_format: (fixture, claim_id, term, reference_form) tuple; decoupled from finding_id hash format for forward-compat with Phase 9 dedup key normalization

categories.description: Intro via N重量份(至M重量份)的X, N莫耳的X, N wt%的X — numeric composition prefix that _INTRO_PATTERN does not recognize
Intro via 至少N個X, 兩X, N個X — quantifier construction not in _INTRO_MULTI_QUANTIFIERS

Intro via inline 一X where the 一 is preceded by a content verb, conjunction, or other context that the current _INTRO_PATTERN left-anchor rejects. Fix shape is left-anchor denylist conversion (reject only preceding 該/所述/前述/其中一), NOT a verb allowlist. Generalizes V一X, 為一X, 輸出一X, 依據一X及一Y, etc.
Intro via X的Y or 形成於X的Y where Y is new and has no 一 prefix; HIGH RISK family because bare-noun intros are surface-form-identical to undefined references
Intro via 定義為X, 稱為X, 記為X, 表示為X — definitional verb prefix not recognized by _INTRO_PATTERN
Walker captures trailing character (particle/verb) into the parenthesized numeral group, e.g., 第一銜接部銜接(222) instead of 第一銜接部(222)
Walker parses 一個 as quantifier + noun start and eats the first character of a compound noun, e.g., 一個人化特徵 parsed as 一個 + 人化特徵 instead of 一 + 個人化特徵
Walker regex noun class fails on a non-CJK char after ordinal and truncates capture to bare 第一/第二

Walker extends capture past a legitimate noun boundary into a fresh N+V clause, e.g., 所述聚苯醚|成分包括 captured as 聚苯醚成分 when the correct boundary falls between 聚苯醚 and 成分 (成分包括 is a fresh N+V predicate). Fix shape is right-boundary lookahead for content-verb followers (包括/包含/是/為/用以/配置以/能夠).
Real drafting error in the source patent — walker is correctly flagging. MUST preserve (protect: true). The round-5 該使用者介面 canonical example lives here.
Term is cleanly introduced in a parent claim but the ancestor-chain walker fails to reach it (cross-category method→system, multi-parent BFS gap, etc.). Phase 9 territory.
全世界/地域-class idiomatic disjunction captures. Deferred to Phase 9 per CLAUDE.md known limitations.

Trailing verb character missing from _TRAILING_VERB_DENYLIST. The intro-side capture includes a trailing verb particle (e.g., 介 from 介於) that normalization fails to strip, causing a mismatch with the reference-side normalized form.

Greedy {2,12} noun capture extends through an embedded 一 that should be a separate intro site. The 一 character is not in the noun exclusion class, so the capture treats it as a regular noun char and swallows it. Fix: post-processing in extract_introductions_tw splits at non-word-internal 一 positions.

Greedy noun capture extends through an embedded reference-form prefix (所述/該/前述/該等/該些). The reference prefix chars are not in the noun exclusion class, so the capture treats them as noun chars. Fix: post-processing truncates at embedded reference prefixes.

Intro captures a term with paren numeral (e.g., 容置杯體(420)) but the reference omits the numeral (所述容置杯體). Prefix matching fails because the intro is LONGER than the reference. Fix: also register the paren-stripped form as an intro variant.
Cannot be categorized from the excerpt alone. Requires reading the full claim text to disambiguate. Schema v2 pass eliminated all v1 ambig entries; category preserved for future fixture additions.

metadata.notes: The source check emits a single aggregate CheckItem per document (set of unique flagged terms). Per-finding records in this snapshot are produced by an audit-only re-walk that replicates the check's internal loop (imports _INTRO_PATTERN from the source module; uses a capturing variant of _REF_PATTERN so reference_form can be exposed). Each fixture record includes a canonical_unique_terms array and a cross_check_ok boolean asserting that the set of unique terms in the audit findings equals the canonical CheckItem.details term set. Finding IDs use claim_{id}_{sha256(term)[:8]}_{within_claim_idx} to remain stable across reruns. | Schema v2 (2026-04-10): ambig resolution pass — all 13 v1 ambig entries recategorized by reading full claim text. Category miss_intro.mid_sentence_verb_object renamed to miss_intro.inline_one_prefix (fix-agnostic name; the corpus pattern is any 一X appearing inline, and the fix shape is a left-anchor denylist conversion rather than a verb-allowlist extension). New category walker_bug.noun_boundary_overgreedy added for 108P001015 c4 聚苯醚成分 (walker extends past a legitimate noun boundary into the fresh N+V clause 成分包括). protect:true count 5 → 8 (+3: 110P000868 c1/c3/c5 電子裝置 — drafter conflated 電子裝置 with 行動裝置; claim never introduces 電子裝置 despite the symbol table listing 800:電子裝置). Proposed walker_bug.conjunction_split_intro category was rejected and collapsed into miss_intro.inline_one_prefix after recognizing the 4 第二方向 findings are the same left-anchor rejection as 為一容置杯體 and 輸出一解鎖指令; one generalized fix covers all sites. | Schema v4 (2026-04-10): relabeled 110P000158 c2/c4 from miss_intro.definitional to walker_bug.trailing_verb_gap (new category). Actual root cause is 介 missing from _TRAILING_VERB_DENYLIST — the intro 一第一夾角介於 captures 第一夾角介 but trailing 介 is not stripped. miss_intro.definitional drops from 3→1. | Schema v5 (2026-04-10): resolved_by for F2 session — 5 entries resolved: 1 miss_intro.definitional (F2_definitional), 2 miss_intro.bare_noun_possessive (F2_definitional_cascade via 上端 prefix match), 2 walker_bug.trailing_verb_gap (F2_trailing_verb_gap). Active: 70, resolved: 14. | Schema v6 (2026-04-10): relabeled 15 miss_intro.inline_one_prefix entries after root-cause analysis on full claim text revealed 4 distinct bugs: walker_bug.greedy_yi_consumption (7), walker_bug.ref_marker_overcapture (2), walker_bug.paren_numeral_asymmetry (1), and 5 additional walker_bug.trailing_verb_gap entries (至/依序/擷取). miss_intro.inline_one_prefix: 15→0. Category count: 14→17. | Schema v7 (2026-04-10): resolved_by for F3 session — 24 entries resolved. Active: 46, resolved: 38. protect:true count unchanged at 8. | Schema v8 (2026-04-10): reclassified 110P000631 c11 第一銜接部銜接(222) from walker_bug.paren_overgreedy to legit_drafting_error (numeral (222) placed after verb 銜接 instead of before — c5 has correct form 第一銜接部(222)銜接). protect:true: 8→9. 108P001015 c4 聚苯醚成分 (noun_boundary_overgreedy): deferred to Phase 9 — N+V boundary detection for 1 entry not worth the risk. | Schema v9 (2026-04-10): resolved_by for F4 + walker bug fix — 5 entries resolved (3 miss_intro.quantifier_list via F4_quantifier_list, 2 walker_bug.regex_noun_class_narrow via F4_連接面_exception). 2 new miss_intro.quantifier_list entries surfaced (158 c1/c3 第一連接面/第二連接面). Active: 43, resolved: 43. protect:true count unchanged at 9. | Schema v10 (2026-04-10): resolved_by for F4b — 2 miss_intro.quantifier_list entries resolved (F4b_bare_N個). Propagation diagnostic: 0 BFS bugs, 3 CROSS-INDEPENDENT (110P000368 c7/c8, 110P000631 c10), 10 UPSTREAM MISS (bare_noun_possessive). All 13 propagation_gap entries annotated with diagnostic provenance. Active: 41, resolved: 45. | Schema v11 (2026-04-10): reclassified 110P000631 c1 容納部 from bare_noun_possessive to legit_drafting_error (protect:true). Drafter introduced 容納空間 but referenced 容納部 — genuine noun mismatch. protect:true 9→10.

walker captured bare ordinal 第一; intended term is 第一剛輪 or 第一交線 — regex noun class fails on next char. SCHEMA V8: root cause is interior-verb 連接 in 第一連接面 truncates to bare 第一. Fix: add 連接面 to _INTERIOR_CUT_EXCEPTIONS.

SCHEMA V8: surfaced after regex_noun_class_narrow fix. Intro via 四個第一連接面 — bare N個 quantifier not in _INTRO_MULTI_QUANTIFIERS. Previously hidden because 連接 interior-verb cut reduced 第一連接面 to bare ordinal 第一.

SCHEMA V4: relabeled from miss_intro.definitional. Actual root cause: c1 intro is 一第一夾角介於 — the existing 一 pattern captures 第一夾角介 but 介 is not in _TRAILING_VERB_DENYLIST, so normalization produces 第一夾角介 which mismatches c2's reference 第一夾角.
same bug as c1 第一 — bare ordinal capture. SCHEMA V8: root cause is interior-verb 連接 in 第二連接面 truncates to bare 第二.
SCHEMA V8: surfaced after regex_noun_class_narrow fix. Intro via 四個第二連接面 — bare N個 quantifier. Symmetric to c1 第一連接面.
SCHEMA V4: relabeled from miss_intro.definitional. Symmetric to c2 — c3 intro 一第二夾角介於 captures 第二夾角介, 介 not stripped.
